name: Vowguard Initiate
description: Gain 1 Dharma when summoned.
flavor_text: A promise is armor before it is a weapon.

name: Sunsteel Cadet
description: A reliable frontline warrior.
flavor_text: The dawn found its edge in her hands.

name: Keeper of the Fifth Bell
description: Restore 2 health when summoned.
flavor_text: When the fifth bell sounds, the wounded rise.

name: Sky-Script Duelist
description: Gain 1 Dharma if your Dharma is below 5.
flavor_text: Every feint is a letter in an unfinished vow.

name: Aegis Clan Warden
description: Other allied warriors gain 1 defense.
flavor_text: No oath ends while the Warden still stands.

name: Astral Banneret
description: Draw a card when summoned.
flavor_text: The banner remembers victories not yet won.

name: Dawn-Circuit Sentinel
description: Gain 2 Dharma when summoned.
flavor_text: Ancient light runs through a modern frame.

name: The Promise Unbroken
description: Restore 3 health and gain 2 Dharma.
flavor_text: Some names become laws of the world.

name: Gloam Alley Whisper
description: Deal 1 damage to the enemy leader.
flavor_text: A secret arrives before its speaker.

name: Debt-Market Knave
description: Gain 1 Karma Debt when summoned.
flavor_text: Everything is affordable. Eventually.

name: Veilglass Assassin
description: Deal 2 damage to the enemy leader.
flavor_text: The mirror shows the strike a heartbeat late.

name: Cursewire Adept
description: The enemy gains 1 Karma Debt.
flavor_text: She knots consequence into copper thread.

name: Midnight Tax Collector
description: Drain 1 Dharma from the enemy.
flavor_text: The Court accepts payment in principles.

name: Rift Bazaar Champion
description: Gain 2 Karma Debt when summoned.
flavor_text: Applause is just another kind of interest.

name: Shadow Mandate Regent
description: Weaken all enemy warriors by 1 attack.
flavor_text: A decree written in darkness still bears a seal.

name: Empress of Last Echoes
description: Deal 3 damage and give the enemy 1 Karma Debt.
flavor_text: Her first word ended an age. Her last awaits.

name: Sunforged Chakram
description: Deal 2 damage to the enemy leader.
flavor_text: It returns only after the truth is struck.

name: Aegis Pulse
description: Restore 3 health.
flavor_text: A shield can be a moment, not an object.

name: Celestial Rail-Spear
description: Deal 4 damage and lose 1 Dharma.
flavor_text: Its path is measured in thunder.

name: Edict Blade
description: Give allied warriors +1 attack and +1 defense.
flavor_text: The blade does not command. The oath does.

name: Voidglass Dagger
description: Deal 2 damage and gain 1 Karma Debt.
flavor_text: The wound appears in every reflection.

name: Debtcoil Whip
description: Deal 3 damage; the enemy gains 1 Karma Debt.
flavor_text: It cracks twice: once now, once later.

name: Eclipse Cannon
description: Deal 6 damage, lose 1 Dharma, and gain 1 Karma Debt.
flavor_text: Night condensed into a single argument.

name: Thirteen-Edge Array
description: All allied warriors gain +2 attack.
flavor_text: There is always another edge behind the first.

name: Oath of Still Waters
description: If you do not attack this turn, gain 2 Dharma next turn.
flavor_text: Restraint gathers force beneath the surface.

name: Oath of the Open Hand
description: If you play no more cards this turn, restore 4 health next turn.
flavor_text: To stop reaching is to discover what remains.

name: Oath of Shared Dawn
description: Gain 1 Dharma and give allied warriors +1 defense.
flavor_text: No sunrise belongs to one witness.

name: Oath of Velvet Knives
description: If you attack this turn, draw a card next turn and gain 1 Karma Debt.
flavor_text: Courtesy hides the sharpest terms.

name: Oath of Borrowed Hours
description: Gain 2 temporary energy and 1 Karma Debt.
flavor_text: Tomorrow always charges interest.

name: Oath of the Hollow Crown
description: Deal 3 damage and drain 1 Dharma from the enemy.
flavor_text: Authority needs only an empty seat.

name: Seal of Gentle Binding
description: Reduce all enemy warriors' attack by 1.
flavor_text: Mercy can still close a fist.

name: Burden of Truth
description: The enemy loses 2 Dharma.
flavor_text: A lie is light until truth picks it up.

name: Radiant Reckoning
description: Deal 2 damage and remove 1 of your Karma Debt.
flavor_text: Consequences look different in honest light.

name: Hex of Closed Roads
description: The enemy gains 1 Karma Debt.
flavor_text: Every route bends back to the tollgate.

name: Memory Leech
description: Discard a random enemy card.
flavor_text: You notice the absence before the bite.

name: Karmic Foreclosure
description: Deal damage equal to the enemy's Karma Debt, minimum 2.
flavor_text: The final notice arrives without an envelope.

name: Citadel Above the Monsoon
description: Your warriors gain +1 defense while this Realm is active.
flavor_text: Rain falls upward to defend its walls.

name: Archive of Living Vows
description: Gain 1 Dharma at the start of your turns.
flavor_text: Every kept promise adds another corridor.

name: Neon Underworld Bazaar
description: Night Court warriors enter with +1 attack.
flavor_text: Open all night. Open in every century.

name: Palace at the End of Sleep
description: At the start of your turn, deal 1 damage to the enemy.
flavor_text: Its doors appear when waking feels impossible.
